data.body: Root cause (proven, joe-debug): read-CLI option parsers in _engine_support/reads_cli.py match ONLY '--opt=value' (e.g. _cmd_session_logs matches arg.startswith('--limit='); _cmd_list matches '--status=' etc). Space form falls to else -> 'Error: unknown option', exit 2 (confirmed: 'session-logs --limit 3' exit=2; '--limit=3' exit=0; same for 'list --status open'). Inconsistent with _cmd_ready (accepts both '--epic' and '--epic='), composer/write commands (claim --assignee <you>), and CLAUDE.md docs which use space form throughout. Resolution decision: accept-BOTH in read-CLI (matches ready+composer+docs); equals-only everywhere would break documented write-command space forms (large breaking change). Fix: add space-form handling to read-CLI flags + document convention in --help + regression tests for space and equals forms.
